concerns.text: T020 (Leakage Detector) and T023 (Utility Judge) are scheduled in Phase 4 (US2) but are required inputs for T021/T022 (Metric Calculators) which also reside in Phase 4. T021/T022 consume the outputs of T020/T023. While grouped in the same phase, the dependency flow is implicit. T020/T023 must be explicitly ordered before T021/T022 to ensure the 'Producer before Consumer' rule is met within the phase. Currently, T021/T022 could theoretically be attempted before T020/T023 are complete.

T032 (Verify utility drop constraint) depends on the output of T023 (Utility score calculator) and T021/T022 (Access Control/Forgetting scores). T032 is listed after T028-T031, but T028-T031 (Statistical Analysis) also depend on the metrics generated in Phase 4. The dependency chain is: Phase 4 Metrics -> Phase 5 Stats (T028) -> Phase 5 Constraint Check (T032). The current linear listing (T028..T033) obscures that T032 cannot run until T021-T023 are complete. This is a semantic ordering violation where a consumer (T032) is not clearly placed after its producer (T021-T023) in the execution flow.

T012 (Intent Classifier) and T013 (Rule Engine) are marked [P] (parallel-safe). However, T014 (Pipeline Orchestration) consumes both. T015 (Deletion Log Priority) and T016 (Timeout) are listed after T014. T015 specifically implements logic 'to prioritize deletion log over role authorization' which is a refinement of the logic in T013 and T014. If T015 is a distinct implementation step modifying the pipeline logic, it should be ordered after T014. If it is part of T014, it should not be a separate task. The current ordering suggests T015 is a separate step, but the dependency on T014's output is not explicit in the [P] tags or phase structure.

T004 (Data Loader) and T005 (Preprocessing) are marked [P]. T005 consumes the raw data fetched by T004. While they are in the same phase, T005 cannot start until T004 completes. Marking T005 as [P] implies it can run in parallel with T004, which is a semantic violation of the 'Producer before Consumer' rule. T005 should not be marked [P] if it depends on T004's artifact.
